description: Send bizevents from the ACE Solutions Vault Cross Charge Workflow to remote tenants. Make sure to add the following domains to the 'allow list' for outbound communication as described [here](https://dt-url.net/allow-outbound-connections): 'sso.dynatrace', 'api.dynatrace', 'tenant.live.dynatrace'

constraints.customMessage: Name has to be between 1 and 50 characters long

token.description: Dynatrace API token, requires the `bizevents.ingest` scope.

constraints.customMessage: Token has to be between 5 and 500 characters long
Name has to be between 1 and 50 characters long
The URL must be secure (https://) and must not contain a trailing slash.
For security reasons please re-enter token/password to save the new configuration.

schemaConstraints.customMessage: A connection with the same name already exists. Please provide a different name.
